title: Emission Control Failure Diagnostic Table by DTC

blocks.text: Fuel, Emission Control Failure Diagnostic Table by DTC

rows: SAE DTC: DTC code displayed on HDS, which is in accordance with SAE (Society of Automotive Engineers of America) standards.

Number of times the PGM-FI warning light blinks: Applies to the number of times the PGM-FI warning light blinks when the SCS is shorted, and the last 4 digits of the SAE DTC code are displayed on the meter for those without an indication.
